---
title: "Network Games"
description: "Strategic network formation, diffusion, influence maximization, centrality as power."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
75 TUTORIALS
:::

# Network Games

Strategic network formation, diffusion, influence maximization, centrality as power.
